# fly_egress_ip (Resource)

Allocates a static egress IP address for a Fly.io application. Import using app_name/ip_id.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "fly_egress_ip" "static" {
  app = fly_app.example.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `app` (String) The application name. Changing this forces a new resource.

### Read-Only

- `address` (String) The allocated egress IP address.
- `city` (String) The city of the egress IP.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the egress IP allocation.
- `region` (String) The region of the egress IP.
- `version` (String) The IP version (v4, v6).
